title: [solved] Dashboard - Timeline widget: How to remove a board?
excerpt:
I have added 10 boards to a Timeline widget on Dashboard. Now I need to remove a few, so I can add others, since there’s a limit of 10 boards. But I can’t find a way to remove boards, only to “hide” them. 
Must I create …

posts.author: Danish (Klaus)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have added 10 boards to a Timeline widget on Dashboard. Now I need to remove a few, so I can add others, since there’s a limit of 10 boards. But I can’t find a way to remove boards, only to “hide” them.

Must I create a new timeline widget and re-apply my settings, to only use the boards I want?

Screenshot_2020-10-21_at_11_46_341435×699 67.5 KB

posts.author: Danish (Klaus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Finally figured it out. The boards are not assigned to the Timeline widget. They are assigned to the entire Dashboard. Makes sense, now that I think about it

So in the upper-left corner of the Dashboard screen, there’s “Boards / 10”-link in my case, click that and deselect the ones to remove.
